---
title: "A Unified Workflow for Causal Inference."
subtitle: "Causal inference across binary, categorical, and continuous treatments — one consistent API. scikit-learn and skpro compatible."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}


<div class="home-hero-grid">
  <div class="surface-section home-intro-panel">
    <span class="section-kicker">For observational ML workflows</span>
    <p class="home-lead"><code>skcausal</code> estimates causal effects from observational data. One <code>fit(X, t, y)</code> contract covers binary, categorical, and continuous treatments.</p>
    <div style="margin-top: 1.2rem;">
      <code class="home-install-cmd">pip install skcausal</code>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="home-code-panel">
    <div class="home-code-window">
      <div class="home-window-bar">
        <div class="home-window-dots" aria-hidden="true">
          <span></span><span></span><span></span>
        </div>
        <span class="home-window-title">minimal continuous-treatment example</span>
      </div>
<pre class="home-code-block"><code>from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from skcausal.causal_estimators import DirectRegressor

estimator = DirectRegressor(
    outcome_regressor=LinearRegression()
)
estimator.fit(X, t, y)
curve = estimator.predict(t)</code></pre>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```


[Choose your path]{.section-kicker}

::: {.home-intent-grid}

::: {.docs-card}
### Continuous treatments

Treatment is a dose, exposure, or intensity and the target is a dose-response curve. Includes density and GPS tooling.

[Open continuous guide](examples/continuous_treatments.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.docs-card}
### Categorical treatments

Treatment has more than two named levels such as `control`, `placebo`, and `treated`.

[Open categorical guide](examples/categorical_treatments.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.docs-card}
### Multi-dimensional treatments

Treatment has multiple dimensions (e.g. dose plus regime).

[Open multi-dimensional guide](examples/multidimensional_treatments.html){.card-link}
:::

:::
